assertions: The answer is a set of at least four distinct questions.
At least three questions are grounded in specifics of this spec (e.g. overnight timing or time zones, CSV vs PDF, frequency options, failure/retry, large exports, who can access the data, retention).
No single question crams two unrelated asks together — each question carries one idea.
The questions are specific to this feature rather than a generic export checklist.
prompt: I'm about to build this feature and here's the rough spec I was handed: "Users can schedule recurring exports of their dashboard data to email. They pick a frequency and a format (CSV or PDF). Exports run server-side overnight and land in the user's inbox the next morning." Read it and give me the questions I should be asking the product owner before I write any code.
